---
name: Contributor task
about: Create a scoped issue for an external contribution
title: ""
labels: "open-to-contributors"
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Describe the change to be made.

## Files or area affected

List the expected files or part of the application involved.

## Acceptance criteria

- Describe the required behaviour.
- Include relevant edge cases.
- State any testing requirements.
- Do not include unrelated changes.

## Boundaries

- Keep the pull request within the agreed scope.
- Do not include secrets, credentials, production data, or private configuration.
- Do not modify private or excluded functionality unless explicitly stated.

## Contribution notes

Please comment on this issue before starting work.

Follow `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
